title: VerbResponseEnvelope
description: Standard wrapper for all verb execution results.

result.description: Shape-specific output. Structure depends on the verb's shape.

hint.description: Actionable next step (e.g., GET /api/v1/agent/verbs/... for the input_schema).

audit_id.description: Present on write verbs. Pass to audit.revert to undo.

rollback_handle.description: Opaque token encoding the inverse action.
